name: Document Store
description: A generic store of named JSON documents: retrieve, store, and delete whole JSON objects by opaque key. "Document" is used in the document-database sense — any JSON object, keyed and stored whole; the store prescribes no schema for it and no key derivation. Callers (such as a binding invoker's runtime resolving CONTEXT_REQUIRED challenges) choose keys and document shapes by their own conventions; this contract only standardizes get/set/delete so independent stores are interchangeable.

Document.description: A stored document: any JSON object, keyed and stored whole. This interface prescribes no schema beyond "is a JSON object" — its properties are unconstrained and callers agree on their shape out of band.

openbindings.document-store.get.description: Retrieve the document stored under a key. Returns null when no entry exists for the key.

key.description: The store key. Opaque to this interface.

output.description: The stored document, or null when no entry exists for the key.

openbindings.document-store.set.description: Store a document under a key, replacing any existing document for that key in full. The value is always a JSON object, so no entry ever holds null and get's null uniformly means "no entry"; to remove an entry, use delete(key).

key.description: The store key. Opaque to this interface.

openbindings.document-store.delete.description: Remove the entry stored under a key. Idempotent: deleting a key with no entry succeeds.

key.description: The store key. Opaque to this interface.
